description: Frontend Reports page for darkdisco. Date range picker (calendar + shorthand). Content section toggles: Executive Summary, Findings Detail, Source Activity, Institution Exposure, Classification Breakdown, Timeline. Charts toggle. Optional filters: severity, status, institution, source (reuse MultiSelect). Generate button POSTs to /api/reports/generate, triggers PDF download. Loading state. Nav link in sidebar. Consistent styling. Depends on backend reporting module.
title: Reports page: frontend report builder UI with download

description:
attached_molecule: da-wisp-doz1
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-20T03:10:47Z
attached_vars: ["base_branch=main"]
dispatched_by: mayor
formula_vars: base_branch=main

Create backend reporting system for darkdisco. New src/darkdisco/reporting/ module with PDF generation engine. Jinja2 HTML templates for report layout (executive summary, findings detail, source activity, institution exposure, classification breakdown, timeline). weasyprint for HTML->PDF, matplotlib for charts (severity pie, trend line, bar charts). New Pydantic schemas for report request (date range, content toggles, chart inclusion). API endpoints: POST /api/reports/generate (returns PDF), GET /api/reports/preview (returns HTML). Add deps to requirements.txt. Sections individually toggleable. Charts embedded as base64 PNG.
title: PDF reporting engine: backend module with weasyprint + matplotlib
